spec_source: whitebox-co/amazon-ads-api docs/schemas with Amazon Ads OAuth refresh auth overlay
description: Plan, measure, and tune Amazon Ads campaigns with OAuth profiles, reports, profitability math, keyword recommendations, and guarded automation.

auth_env_var_specs.name: AMAZON_ADS_CLIENT_ID
auth_env_var_specs.description: Login with Amazon client ID for the Amazon Ads application.

auth_env_var_specs.name: AMAZON_ADS_CLIENT_SECRET
auth_env_var_specs.description: Login with Amazon client secret for the Amazon Ads application.

auth_env_var_specs.name: AMAZON_ADS_REFRESH_TOKEN
auth_env_var_specs.description: Refresh token from authorizing the Amazon Ads application.

env_var.name: AMAZON_ADS_API_CLIENT_ID
env_var.description: Amazon Ads API client ID sent on every API request. Defaults to the same value as AMAZON_ADS_CLIENT_ID in the printed CLI.

env_var.name: AMAZON_ADS_PROFILE_ID
env_var.description: Amazon Ads profile ID used as the request scope.

novel_features.name: Profitability analytics
novel_features.description: Estimate ad profitability from Amazon Ads reports, COGS, fees, and optional amazon-seller store revenue.

novel_features.name: Search term optimization
novel_features.description: Turn Search Term Reports into promotion, negation, and waste-reduction recommendations.

novel_features.name: Performance planning
novel_features.description: Summarize spend, sales, ACOS, placement performance, product profit, and seasonal budget signals.

novel_features.name: Hourly and pacing analysis
novel_features.description: Analyze reports with hour/hourOfDay or timestamped rows for conversion windows and early budget exhaustion.

novel_features.name: Keyword lifecycle and bid intelligence
novel_features.description: Track keyword trend history locally and recommend bid changes against target ACOS.

novel_features.name: Competitive intelligence
novel_features.description: Mine share-of-voice and product-targeting reports for competitor ASIN and keyword visibility signals.

novel_features.name: Report normalization
novel_features.description: Poll Amazon Ads async report status, read gzip reports, normalize CSV/JSON, and optionally import to the local SQLite store.

novel_features.name: Guarded automation
novel_features.command: auto-negate, auto-promote, budget-rebalance, bid-rules apply, automation-audit
novel_features.description: Plan and optionally apply negative keywords, exact promotions, budget changes, and bid rules with dry-run defaults, guardrails, and audit logs.

novel_features.name: Profile-aware OAuth setup
novel_features.command: auth login, profiles list, profiles select, profiles current
novel_features.description: Run Login with Amazon OAuth, persist refresh-token credentials locally, and select the Amazon Ads profile scope used on API calls.

catalog_description: Plan, measure, and tune Amazon Ads campaigns with OAuth profiles, reports, profitability math, keyword recommendations, and guarded automation.
